customInstructions: This is the official Previous Year Paper (PYP) of HP Patwari held in 2013.
Total Questions: 100, Total Marks: 100, Total Time: 100 Minutes.
There was NO negative marking in this exam format.
Questions are available in both English and Hindi.

questions.questionEn:
[Passage for Q26-30] In March, the family sat down at the table and began to talk about the summer holiday. Where should they go this year? That was the question which had to be answered. Should they go to the sea-side, or to the country? Did they prefer fun on the farm to basking on a beach? The children soon settled that. With one voice they cried, 'sea-side, please!'...

Q26. Why was a family meeting held at the table?
questions.questionHi:
[Passage for Q26-30]

Q26. गद्यांश के अनुसार, मेज पर पारिवारिक बैठक क्यों आयोजित की गई? (According to the passage, why was a family meeting held at the table?)
options: To inform the children about a function to be held after sometime
To plan the programme for summer holiday
To plan an excursion for site seeing
To discuss about some quarrel concerned with the family

questions.questionEn: What was their decision regarding the summer holiday?
questions.questionHi: गर्मियों की छुट्टियों के संबंध में उनका क्या निर्णय था? (What was their decision regarding the summer holiday?)
options: To go on a continental tour of Europe
To go to sea-side for enjoyment
To go to Switzerland where Paul had gone on Scout trip
To go to the countryside to enjoy fun on the farm

questions.questionEn: What was an alternate programme before the family?
questions.questionHi: परिवार के सामने एक वैकल्पिक कार्यक्रम क्या था? (What was an alternate programme before the family?)
options: To arrange vacation programme for the children
To go to their home village into the interior
To go to see their relations in different places

questions.questionEn: How was the decision taken by the family?
questions.questionHi: परिवार द्वारा निर्णय कैसे लिया गया? (How was the decision taken by the family?)
options: Programme was decided by the children and okayed by parents
Mother suggested it and it was okayed by the children
The programme was discussed by all and the majority decision taken
Father suggested an alternative programme and it was chosen by them unanimously

questions.questionEn: What was the idea of deckchairs for parents?
questions.questionHi: माता-पिता के लिए डेक-चेयर का विचार क्यों था? (What was the idea of deckchairs for parents?)
options: Because children wanted their parents to witness their enjoyment on the sea-side.
Because their mother wanted as such.
Because it was the desire of their father.
Because the parents always preferred deck-chairs.

questions.questionEn: What does country-love mean according to the passage? (Passage 51-55)
questions.questionHi:
[गद्यांश 51-55]: वास्तव में हृदय वही है जो कोमल भावों और स्वदेश प्रेम से ओतप्रोत हो। प्रत्येक देशवासी को अपने वतन से प्रेम होता है, चाहे उसका देश सूखा, गर्म या दलदलों से युक्त हो। देश-प्रेम के लिए किसी आकर्षण की आवश्यकता नहीं होती, बल्कि वह तो अपनी भूमि के प्रति मनुष्य मात्र की स्वाभाविक ममता है...

प्रश्न 51. देश-प्रेम का अभिप्राय है-
options: देश के प्रति कोमल भावों का उदय
देश हित के लिए शत्रु से संघर्ष करना
देश के प्रति व्यक्ति का स्वाभाविक ममत्व
अनथक प्रयत्न करके देश का निर्माण करना
